doc: A self-playing sample arpeggio. The Clock's beat gate drives a sequencer that emits scale degrees — a major arpeggio (degrees 0 2 4 7 4 2 = root, third, fifth, octave, fifth, third) — one per beat into a Voicer, which resolves each degree to Hz through the default C-major/12-TET tonal context. The Voicer's per-Voice freq + gate fire the 'blip' sample (recorded pitch MIDI 57, ~220 Hz); pitch shifts the playback rate. Set tempo via /clock/tempo; edit the line via /sequencer/step1../sequencer/step6 and /sequencer/length; play in another key by adding a context op (see scale-demo.json).

nodes.doc: Walks a major arpeggio one step per beat -> degree Messages.
Gate edge fires the sample; freq sets the playback rate.
